features: Specially formulated for normal and greasy hair
Leaves hair feeling fresh and healthy looking
Works best to leave it on for 1-2 minutes
description: Ingredients Aqua, Cetearyl Alcohol, Stearamidopropyl Dimethylamine, Dimethicone, Lactic Acid, Perfume, Sodium Chloride, Edta, Amodimethicone, Magnesium Nitrate, Panthenol, Vitis Vinifera Seed Oil, Pyrus Malus Juice, Benzophenone-4, Hexyl Cinnamal, Limonene, Linalool, Ci 19140, Ci 15985, Ci 42090 Directions Apply conditioner after shampooing, distribute evenly through hair, let it sit for 1-2 minutes, then rinse thoroughly. Safety Warning Caution: use only as directed. Avoid contact with eyes. If eye contact occurs wash out immediately with warm water. If irritation occurs discontinue use. As we are always looking to improve our products, our formulations change from time to time, so please always check the product packaging before useavoid contact with eyes. In case of contact with eyes, rinse thoroughly with water. See more
